title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Each consecutive week of full partici
content:
✔ Each consecutive week of full participation = XP multiplier.
✔ Streak bonuses are permanent once unlocked.

📜 Redemption System (Recover from a Setback)
✔ Fail an assignment?
• Complete an extra Skill Check for partial XP recovery.
✔ Lose a streak?
• Perform a Redemption Quest to regain lost status.

📜 Example: Redemption Quest – “The Phoenix Challenge”
✔ If a student loses their streak, they may publicly debate the professor on a major literary theme.
✔ If they succeed, their streak is restored & they gain a one-time XP boost.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages consistency while allowing second chances.
• Ties game mechanics into classic literary tropes of failure & rebirth.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 205 (chunk 205/555)
